prompt: Order these aviation milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Lindbergh trans-Atlantic
events.fact: 1927 — first solo nonstop flight across Atlantic

events.title: Hindenburg disaster
events.fact: 1937 — German airship catches fire in New Jersey

events.title: Chuck Yeager breaks sound barrier
events.fact: 1947 — flew Bell X-1 rocket plane at Mach 1.06

events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 reuse
events.fact: 2015 — first landing and reuse of orbital rocket booster
